hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Although viral fever can cause abdominal pain, the pattern of fever is not typical

hypotheses.label: Typhoid

inputs.text: Ab mujhe tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai aur bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hoon
inputs.image_desc: prescription from previous PHC visit shown

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Tez bukhar, kabz ke baad dast, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Although gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea, the pattern of fever and other symptoms do not fit

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with cyclical fever, which is not seen here

inputs.text: Meri halat aur bhi kharab ho gayi hai, bukhar abhi bhi hai aur main bahut thakawat mehsoos kar rahi hoon

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged fever, exhaustion, and bruising without injury confirm typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of response to treatment and worsening symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to absence of cyclical fever and other specific symptoms
